mapper.sql: mall_goods_spu.`id`, mall_goods_spu.`spu_code`, mall_goods_spu.`name`, mall_goods_spu.`sell_point`, mall_goods_spu.`description`, mall_goods_spu.`category_first`, mall_goods_spu.`category_second`, mall_goods_spu.`pic_urls`, mall_goods_spu.`shelf`, mall_goods_spu.`sort`, mall_goods_spu.`price_down`, mall_goods_spu.`price_up`, mall_goods_spu.`sale_num`, mall_goods_spu.`create_time`, mall_goods_spu.`update_time`, mall_goods_spu.`spec_type`, mall_goods_spu.`del_flag`, mall_goods_spu.`version`, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`sales_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_down`) AS sales_price, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`market_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_up`) AS market_price, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`cost_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_down`) AS cost_price, IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(mall_goods_sku.`stock`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), 0) AS stock

mall_goods_spu.`id`, mall_goods_spu.`spu_code`, mall_goods_spu.`name`, mall_goods_spu.`sell_point`, NULL AS description, mall_goods_spu.`category_first`, mall_goods_spu.`category_second`, mall_goods_spu.`pic_urls`, mall_goods_spu.`shelf`, mall_goods_spu.`sort`, mall_goods_spu.`price_down`, mall_goods_spu.`price_up`, mall_goods_spu.`sale_num`, mall_goods_spu.`create_time`, mall_goods_spu.`update_time`, mall_goods_spu.`spec_type`, mall_goods_spu.`del_flag`, mall_goods_spu.`version`, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`sales_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_down`) AS sales_price, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`market_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_up`) AS market_price, IFNULL(( SELECT MIN(mall_goods_sku.`cost_price`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), mall_goods_spu.`price_down`) AS cost_price, IFNULL(( SELECT SUM(mall_goods_sku.`stock`) FROM mall_goods_sku mall_goods_sku WHERE mall_goods_sku.`spu_id` = mall_goods_spu.`id` AND mall_goods_sku.`del_flag` = '0' AND mall_goods_sku.`enable` = '1' ), 0) AS stock
